chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: Movement authorized by a permit issued under this subchapter may not exceed the posted speed limit or 55 miles per hour, whichever is less. A violation of this provision constitutes a moving violation.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.257 — Speed Limit

Movement authorized by a permit issued under this subchapter may not exceed the posted speed limit or 55 miles per hour, whichever is less. A violation of this provision constitutes a moving violation.

*Added by Acts 2005, 79th Leg., Ch. 538 (H.B.1044), Sec. 1, eff. June 17, 2005.*
